message:
chore(conformance): update stub priority ranking fixture

Refresh stub_priority_ranking.json with latest priority ordering
data from concurrent analysis pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -96,20 +96,22 @@
     "tiers": [
       {
         "tier": "T1_critical",
-        "score_range": ">=10.0",
-        "description": "Stubs blocking 4+ workloads. Implement immediately.",

+        "description": "Stub symbols returning error/no-op. Blocks workload functionality entirely.",
